General.Name: ProCredit Holding AG & Co KGaA
General.Description: ProCredit Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides commercial banking products and services for small and medium enterprises and private clients in Europe, South America, and Germany. The company accepts various deposits, including current, savings, and term deposit accounts. It also offers business loans for wholesale and retail trade; agriculture; forestry and fishing; production; transportation and storage; construction and real estate; hotel, restaurant, and catering; electricity, gas, steam, and air conditioning supply; and other activities, as well as investment and green loans; and private loans, such as housing, investment, and consumer loans. The company was formerly known as Internationale Micro Investitionen AG. ProCredit Holding AG was founded in 1998 and is based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.

2.Name: Mr. Georgios  Chatzis
2.Title: Chief Risk Officer & Member of Management Board
